info.title: OxiCloud API
info.description: REST API for OxiCloud — self-hosted cloud storage, calendar & contacts

post.summary:
Add multiple items to favourites in a single transaction.
POST /api/favorites/batch
Add an item to user's favorites

delete.summary: Remove an item from user's favorites

get.summary: Access a shared item via its token

post.summary: Verify password for a password-protected shared item

get.summary:
Get all shared links created by the current user.
Supports optional filtering by item_id + item_type query params.
Get information about a specific shared link by ID
Gets all items in the trash for the current user

delete.summary: Empties the trash completely for the current user
Moves a file to the trash
Moves a folder to the trash
Permanently deletes an item from the trash

post.summary: Restores an item from the trash to its original location

BatchFavoriteItem.description: Single item in a batch-add-favorites request.

favorites.description:
Full list of the user's favourites (enriched), so the client can
replace its local cache in a single round-trip.

name.description: Name of the folder to create

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID (None for root level)

DeletePermanentlyRequest.description: Request to permanently delete an item from trash

FavoriteItemDto.description:
DTO for favorites item, enriched with item metadata via SQL JOIN
so the frontend does not need N+1 requests to resolve names/sizes.

created_at.description: When the item was added to favorites

icon_class.description: FontAwesome icon CSS class (e.g. "fas fa-file-image", "fas fa-folder")

icon_special_class.description: Extra CSS class for icon styling (e.g. "image-icon", "folder-icon")

id.description: Unique identifier for the favorite entry

item_id.description: ID of the favorited item (file or folder)

item_name.description: Display name of the file or folder

item_size.description: Size in bytes (files only; folders → None)

modified_at.description: Last modification timestamp of the item

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID (folder_id for files, parent_id for folders)

size_formatted.description: Formatted file size (e.g. "3.27 MB"); "--" for folders

user_id.description: User ID who owns this favorite

icon_special_class.description: Extra CSS class for icon styling (e.g. "image-icon", "" when default)

mime_type.description:
MIME type — `Arc<str>` because MIME values repeat across files
and DTOs are cloned on every request (clone is O(1) atomic increment).

owner_id.description: Owner user ID (omitted from JSON when None)

sort_date.description:
Sort date for Photos timeline — COALESCE(EXIF captured_at, created_at).
Only populated by the /api/photos endpoint.

icon_special_class.description: Extra CSS class for icon styling (always "folder-icon")

is_root.description: Whether this is a root folder

owner_id.description: Owner user ID (scopes visibility per user)

FolderListingDto.description:
Combined DTO that returns both sub-folders and files for a given folder
in a single response, eliminating the double-fetch on every navigation.

parent_id.description: New parent folder ID (None for root level)

MoveToTrashRequest.description: Request to move an item to trash

PaginationDto.description: A DTO to represent pagination information

has_next.description: Indicates if there is a next page

has_prev.description: Indicates if there is a previous page

PaginationRequestDto.description: A DTO to represent a pagination request

RecentItemDto.description:
DTO for recent items, enriched with item metadata via SQL JOIN
so the frontend does not need N+1 requests to resolve names/sizes.

icon_class.description: FontAwesome icon CSS class (e.g. "fas fa-file-image", "fas fa-folder")

icon_special_class.description: Extra CSS class for icon styling (e.g. "image-icon", "folder-icon")

id.description: Unique identifier for the recent item

item_name.description: Display name of the file or folder

item_size.description: Size in bytes (files only; folders → None)

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID (folder_id for files, parent_id for folders)

size_formatted.description: Formatted file size (e.g. "3.27 MB"); "--" for folders

RestoreFromTrashRequest.description: Request to restore an item from trash

SearchCriteriaDto.description:
* Data Transfer Object for file search criteria.
 *
 * This structure represents all possible search parameters that can be used
 * to filter files and folders in the system. It supports various filter types
 * including name matching, file types, date ranges, and size constraints.

created_after.description: Optional minimum creation date (seconds since epoch)

created_before.description: Optional maximum creation date (seconds since epoch)

file_types.description: Optional list of file extensions to include (e.g., "pdf", "jpg")

folder_id.description: Optional folder ID to limit search scope

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

max_size.description: Optional maximum file size in bytes

min_size.description: Optional minimum file size in bytes

modified_after.description: Optional minimum modification date (seconds since epoch)

modified_before.description: Optional maximum modification date (seconds since epoch)

name_contains.description: Optional text to search in file/folder names

recursive.description: Whether to search recursively within subfolders (default: true)

SearchFileResultDto.description: A file search result enriched with server-computed metadata

icon_class.description: CSS icon class for the file type (e.g., "fas fa-file-pdf")

icon_special_class.description: Extra CSS class for icon styling (e.g., "pdf-icon", "code-icon js-icon")

SearchFolderResultDto.description: A folder search result enriched with server-computed metadata

is_root.description: Whether it is a root folder

SearchResultsDto.description:
* Data Transfer Object for search results.
 *
 * This structure encapsulates the results of a search operation, including
 * both files and folders that match the search criteria, along with pagination
 * information and server-computed metadata.

files.description: Files matching the search criteria (enriched with metadata)

folders.description: Folders matching the search criteria (enriched with metadata)

has_more.description: Whether there are more results available

total_count.description: Total count of matching items (for pagination)

icon_special_class.description: Extra CSS class for icon styling

SearchSuggestionsDto.description: DTO for search suggestion results (quick prefix search)

suggestions.description: Suggested file/folder names matching the query prefix

SetupAdminDto.description:
DTO for the one-time initial admin setup endpoint (`/api/setup`).
Available only when the system is not yet initialized (no admin exists).

TrashedItemDto.description: DTO representing an item in the trash

icon_class.description: FontAwesome icon class for the file type

icon_special_class.description: Special CSS class for icon styling (e.g., "image-icon", "pdf-icon")
